title: Taittiriya Upanishad: The Five Sheaths
description: The teaching of the five sheaths (koshas) — from food to bliss — that encase the true Self.
introduction: The teaching of the five sheaths (koshas) — from food to bliss — that encase the true Self.

translation.original_text: brahmavidāpnoti param | satyaṃ jñānam anantaṃ brahma
translation.text: The knower of Brahman attains the Supreme. Brahman is truth, knowledge, infinite.
